content.full_text:
JOSEPH M. GOEDEN, City Manager
CAROL B. RICHARDSON, Assistant City Manager

CITY ADMINISTRATION
OFFICE OF THE CITY CLERK
PERSONNEL DIVISION

THE CITY OF
WEST SACRAMENTO

OFFICE OF THE CITY MANAGER
P.O. Box 966                           WEST SACRAMENTO, CA 95691                           (916) 373-5800


October 4, 1990


Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA  95814

To whom it may concern:

Enclosed you will find a copy of the City of West Sacramento Resolution 87-74 adopting a
Conflict of Interest Code.

We plan on updating the code in the near future, but would like you first to review it and
suggest any changes or revisions you might think necessary.

Thank you for your assistance. If you have any questions, please call.

Sincerely,

Helen M. Kanowsky
City Clerk

Enclosure

10049001kr

sections.question_synthetic: The City of West Sacramento requests FPPC review and feedback on their Conflict of Interest Code (Resolution 87-74) and suggestions for necessary changes or revisions before updating it.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a municipality to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No formal Question or Conclusion sections present. Document is a cover letter accompanying a resolution for FPPC review.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: The City of West Sacramento requests FPPC review and feedback on their Conflict of Interest Code (Resolution 87-74) and suggestions for necessary changes or revisions before updating it.
